title: JavaScript library for rapid AI and XR prototyping
abstract: A JavaScript library accelerating the development of AI and extended reality (XR) applications, offering rapid prototyping and seamless integration for creators.
abstract_zh: 嘿朋友，你见过这么一款神器吗？它能让做AI和虚拟现实应用的小哥哥小姐姐们开发速度嗖的一下就上去了！关键是还不用担心代码集成的问题，直接拿来用就行，想想都爽啊！
